allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'docs: aggiungi membro DF-1 Desire al team \(Data & Finanza\)' --body ' *)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" pr view --json url)

hooks.command: echo 'CAVEMAN MODE ACTIVE (full). Drop articles/filler/pleasantries/hedging. Fragments OK. Code/commits/security: write normal. NEVER apply caveman to: UI strings, user-facing error messages, notification text, email templates, or any content that will be displayed in the app.'

[ -f ../Alpha-Centauri-graph/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists in ../Alpha-Centauri-graph/. Read ../Alpha-Centauri-graph/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
